name: Your Name
title: Software Engineer · AI Specialist · Cybersecurity Professional
tagline: I build intelligent, secure, and scalable systems — from neural networks to hardened infrastructure — turning complex problems into elegant, production-ready software.

biography: I'm a systems-minded engineer who works at the intersection of artificial intelligence, software engineering, and cybersecurity. Over the past several years I've shipped production ML pipelines, hardened enterprise infrastructure, and built full-stack platforms used by real teams.

My work is guided by one idea: technology should be powerful, trustworthy, and simple to use. Whether I'm training a model, securing a network, or designing an interface, I hold every layer of the stack to the same standard.
about.mission: To design intelligent systems that are secure by default and delightful to use — bridging the gap between cutting-edge AI research and dependable, real-world engineering.

values.title: Security First
values.description: Every system I build is designed to resist failure and attack, not just to work on the happy path.

values.title: Relentless Curiosity
values.description: I study new architectures, threat models, and tools before they become mainstream.

values.title: Craft & Clarity
values.description: Clean code, clear documentation, and thoughtful UX are not optional extras — they're the job.

values.title: Impact Over Ego
values.description: I measure success by the problems solved and the teams empowered, not by credit taken.

timeline.label: Led full-stack platform for enterprise client
Specialized in applied AI & threat detection
